Package microui.event

Class PointerManager

java.lang.Object
microui.event.PointerManager
public final class PointerManager extends Object
Manages pointer (mouse/touch) ownership for UI components. Ensures that only one component can claim pointer focus at a time.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static boolean
    hasOwner()
    Checks whether any view currently owns the pointer.
    static boolean
    isModalViewOpen()
    Checks whether a modal component is open.
    static boolean
    isOwner(SpatialView spatialView)
    Checks whether the given view is the current pointer owner.
    static void
    release()
    Releases pointer ownership.
    static boolean
    request(SpatialView spatialView)
    Requests pointer ownership for the given spatial view.
    static void
    setModalViewOpen(boolean modalViewOpen)
    Setter for components which implement ModalParent interface.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • isModalViewOpen

      public static boolean isModalViewOpen()
      Checks whether a modal component is open.
      Returns:
      true if modal view component is open, false otherwise

    • setModalViewOpen

      public static void setModalViewOpen(boolean modalViewOpen)
      Setter for components which implement ModalParent interface.
      Parameters:
      modalViewOpen - true if open, false otherwise

    • request

      public static boolean request(SpatialView spatialView)
      Requests pointer ownership for the given spatial view.
      Parameters:
      spatialView - the view requesting ownership, cannot be null.
      Returns:
      true if the view now owns the pointer, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if spatialView is null.

    • hasOwner

      public static boolean hasOwner()
      Checks whether any view currently owns the pointer.
      Returns:
      true if an owner exists, false otherwise.

    • isOwner

      public static boolean isOwner(SpatialView spatialView)
      Checks whether the given view is the current pointer owner.
      Parameters:
      spatialView - the view to check, cannot be null.
      Returns:
      true if the view is the owner, false otherwise.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if spatialView is null.

    • release

      public static void release()
      Releases pointer ownership. After calling this, no view owns the pointer.
